query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: A person stands on a train platform at night holding an open umbrella. A train moves along the adjacent track, its illuminated windows and headlights forming elongated bright lines. The foreground shows textured yellow safety strips along the platform edge, and a metal railing runs along the right side. Warm amber light covers the platform and figure, while the background sky is completely dark.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person stands on a train platform at night holding an open umbrella, looking toward a train rendered with intentional motion blur that streaks the headlights and windows into glowing horizontal lines. The entire scene is bathed in a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor cast that shifts the platform, textured safety strips, and figure into unsettling warm hues against the dark night.
